title: SpearLimiter
description: Remove spears from your Minecraft server with SpearLimiter, a lightweight plugin that lets you delete, disable, or limit spear items, crafting, and usage to keep gameplay balanced on SMP and PvP servers.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/jz4ZgyxCYfw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Remove spears from server plugin
SpearLimiter is a lightweight Minecraft plugin that allows server owners to delete, disable, or limit spear items entirely. If you want to remove spears from your Minecraft server, prevent spear crafting, or block spear drops, SpearLimiter gives you full control with zero performance impact.

This plugin lets you delete spear items, disable spear crafting, and prevent spears from being obtained through mob drops or auto crafters. It is ideal for SMP, PvP, and custom gameplay servers that want to limit spears, balance combat, or completely remove spears from the game.

Admins can easily track spears across the server by checking if a player currently has a spear, locating spear items, and instantly removing all spears when needed. SpearLimiter is simple to use, highly effective, and designed to keep your server clean and balanced.


Commands:
/infospear – View plugin information and check spear status
/hasspear <player> – Check if a player currently has a spear
/clearspears – Instantly remove all spears from the server

SpearLimiter is the perfect solution if you are looking for a Minecraft spear removal plugin, limit spears plugin, or a way to delete spear items from your server without breaking gameplay.
